summary: All 14 verification items PASS. The SPA wiring for the tracking view is correctly integrated: web/index.html has the view container, script reference, and empty nav-links ul; web/js/app.js has dynamic nav rendering with conditional Tracking link, optional route registration, hash-based view tracking, view name mapping, permission-based refresh, SSE reconnection refresh, and both success/error path nav rendering in _applyReadOnlyMode; web/js/views/tracking.js exports the view module with full loading/empty/error state handling; web/js/api.js provides the getLoggedUsers method.
